title: Rich Tunisian epoisses Grill
description: A garlicky, fluffy, comforting grilled eggplant dish with spiced paste, tomato topping, and poached egg, Whole30‑friendly and bursting with Tunisian flavor.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium‑high heat.
Slice each eggplant lengthwise into 1/2 inch thick halves and score the flesh in a crisscross pattern.
In a small bowl, mix 4 tbsp olive oil, minced garlic, smoked paprika, cumin, coriander, salt, and pepper to create a garlicky herb paste.
Brush each eggplant half generously with the paste, reserving some for later.
Place the eggplant halves on the grill, flesh side down, and cook for 6‑7 minutes until charred and soft, then flip and grill for another 4‑5 minutes.

While the eggplant is grilling, heat a small saucepan over low heat and add 1 tbsp olive oil to poach the eggs: crack each egg into a cup, slide gently into the oil, cover, and simmer for 3‑4 minutes until whites are set and yolks remain runny.
Remove the grilled eggplants from the grill and top each half with a sliced tomato, a lightly squeezed lemon juice, and a drizzle of the reserved paste.
Carefully place a poached egg on top of each tomato‑topped eggplant half.
Garnish the plates with chopped parsley, a squeeze of lemon zest, and a final drizzle of olive oil.
Serve immediately, letting the warmth of the grilled eggplant and the runny yolk mingle for a comforting, fluffy finish.
